tps.title: Event listener is never unsubscribed because `.bind(this)` creates a new function
tps.reason: Real pattern issue. The ECS plugin already fixed this by storing bound references. Biomes, crafting, daynight, interaction, particles, sound plugins all have the same bug.

tps.title: Event listeners are never removed because bound handler references differ
tps.reason: Same .bind(this) pattern issue as biomes plugin. ECS plugin shows the correct pattern with stored bound references.

tps.title: Event listener is not removed because `bind(this)` creates a different function reference
tps.reason: Same .bind(this) leak pattern across all plugins.

tps.title: Update listener cannot be removed because `bind()` creates a new function
Event listeners cannot be removed because `.bind(this)` creates new function instances
Event listeners cannot be removed because `.bind(this)` creates new function objects
Engine can be left in a broken running state if startup async work fails
tps.reason: start() sets running=true before awaiting enableAll(). If that rejects, running stays true but animation loop never started. Real state management bug.

tps.title: Chunk completion path is not exception-safe and can strand jobs as permanently busy
tps.reason: If onmessage handler throws after receiving chunk data, the worker stays marked busy forever. Real resource leak.

tps.title: Errors during async world generation leave the promise unresolved and player state inconsistent
tps.reason: initializeWorld has no try/catch around generateInitialTerrain/updateChunkMeshes. If they throw, player stays frozen at y=120 and promise never resolves.

tps.title: ASCII parser strips leading and trailing spaces from every row
tps.reason: If pixel art uses spaces for transparent/white pixels at row edges, trim() removes them, corrupting the texture. Real rendering bug.

tps.title: Lake generation uses undefined `this.waterLevel`, producing invalid heights
tps.reason: Water level is 75 (defined in CLAUDE.md) but if this.waterLevel is undefined in the biome plugin context, lake generation would produce NaN heights. Real bug.

tps.title: Wall-sliding logic loses the attempted Z movement due to aliasing `camera.position`
tps.reason: If collision code modifies camera.position.x in the X-check, then the Z-check uses the already-modified position instead of the original attempted position. Real physics bug causing janky wall sliding.

tps.title: Transparent pixels are forced opaque because alpha uses `|| 255`
tps.reason: If color lookup returns alpha=0 for transparency, `|| 255` coerces it to 255 (opaque). Glass and water textures would lose transparency. Real rendering bug.
